texto: Love is a force that connects us to every strand of the universe an unconditional state that characterizes human nature a form of knowledge that is always there for us if only we can open ourselves to it.
explicacao: Citação de Emily Hilburn Sell sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Love is a force that connects us to every strand of the universe an unconditional state that char…” articula reflexao, lighten, force em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
